entry.title: About SSL configuration of connectivity between DAA and Solman Java system
entry.content:
If the DAA connectivity requires encryption, where can we find the relevant documentation about SSL configuration.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: About SSL configuration of connectivity between DAA a...
entry.content:
Hi,

If you want to configure P4S/SSL for connectivity between DAA and Solution Manager Java system, you need to complete the P4S/SSL define on Solman Java system according to "Preparing the AS Java" of documentation below:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/techops/3806942070.html

And for connecting DAA to Solman with SSL, please refer to SAP Note:
1898685 - Connect the Diagnostics Agent to Solution Manager using SSL

Best regards,
Haterm

entry.title: S4HANA Private Cloud Transportation Management settlement with different carriers
entry.content:
Dear TM Experts,

We are implementing S4HANA Private Cloud TM now, one business requirement for us is:

One ocean freight booking with more than 4 stages and for different stages will assign different carriers and the charge calculation will also be set at stage level, which means when comes to the freight settlement, if there are 4 stages will 4 different carriers, system need to generate 4 freight settlement with 4 different invoicing party separately.

I see in Public Cloud Ocean Freight Booking, there is the Executing Carrier & Invoicing Carrier at stage level which can perfect meet the requirement, and the Invoicing Carrier will be copied to Purchase Order as Supplier

But in S4HANA Private Cloud, there is only a Carrier at stage level, there is no Invoicing Carrier, and when goes to the settlement, the 4 stages generated 4 settlement with same carriers, and we can not manual edit the invoicing party during the settlement, which we don't want.

Could you please help to suggest how can S4HANA Private Could Ocean Freight Booking settle with different carriers for different stages?

Thanks,

Xinyue

entry.title: Temu Discount Code Uk Existing Customers Nhs {act587154} or {frf048797}
entry.content:
Blog Formatting Post-Migration
Due to the migration, some blog formatting changed, resulting in issues like excess white space and broken links. Editing old posts to restore previous formatting often worsens the issue and violates community best practices. We advise focusing on creating new content that adheres to current blogging standards, using the "Clear formatting" option when copying text from Word.

Subscriptions Not Triggering Notifications
Some members, including myself, have experienced issues with subscription notifications. While we investigate, you might try unsubscribing and resubscribing to your tags or adjusting your notification settings. We are working on resolving this problem and will update you as more information becomes available.

Character Restrictions in Display Names
We’re aware of complaints regarding character restrictions in display names and are exploring options to extend them. If your display name was truncated during migration, you can change it in the "My content" area of the site. For more details on display names and profile usernames, please refer to my post about profiles post-migration.

We anticipate more updates as we continue to refine the platform post-migration. Please subscribe to the "What's New" section to stay informed as my colleagues and I share further updates. Thank you for your patience and cooperation.

Ludo

entry.title: Re: iOS build fails
entry.content: Hi @SeifEldin , to answer your question, yes I uploaded the .p12 file as the distribution certificate & .mobileprovision as the provisioning profile

entry.title: Re: A/R
entry.content:
Hello, 

In order to get the open AR data, I have used FBL5H and click the open items. 

I hope you get help.

entry.title: Re: Upgrade strategy on SAP Business One Cloud

Actually, we are using the same version CCC & SAP B1 like yours.

Did you get any answer on this? Appreciate it if you can give us idea as well.

 

 

Thanks,

Ferdinand

entry.title: Re: Handling stalled workflows in EC: Reminder and Escalation
entry.content:
@lukemarson Thank you for your comment. Can you please help me understand below scenario too?

When Escalation path is set-up, and when the workflow moved to the new approver, will he continue to get Remind in Days emails too per the value set-up in the workflow, or will this not be respected one Escalation journey kicks-in?

entry.content: How to Short close STO

entry.title: Re: Writing month values (got from a Form in a story) via...
entry.content:
Hi Mike-W, 

   I'm not sure about your use case. Whatever value user entered in the table is already stored in planning model. What do you want to achieve with data action? 

Best regards, William

entry.title: DP Agent installation and configuration issues
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

The situation is described as follows. How should we troubleshoot this issue?

After following the reference documents for installation and configuration, checking the Agent Status reveals that the HANA Connection has not been successfully established. However, the Agents in Datasphere are showing as connected. In this situation, it does not seem possible to register ABAP Adapters with SAP Datasphere.


The version of the HANA DP Agent I installed is:
WINDOWS ON X64 64BIT
SP07 Patch 40 (2.7.4) for HANA DP AGENT 2.0
Operating System: 64-bit Windows Server 2019

framework_alert.trc
2024-06-19 11:57:50,819 [ERROR] DPFramework | RequestHandlerThread.run [] - EOFException : Socket closed while trying to read.
2024-06-19 11:57:55,873 [ERROR] MDSListener | MDSListener.run [] - SocketListener: Listener is shutdown. socket closed
2024-06-19 11:58:00,915 [ERROR] DPFramework | SocketListener.run [] - java.net.SocketException: socket closed
2024-06-19 11:59:30,055 [ERROR] DPFramework | RequestHandlerThread.run [] - Exception for connectorId[127.0.0.1:63821] : java.net.SocketException: Connection reset

agentcli_alert.trc
2024-06-19 11:58:27,827 [ERROR] DPFramework | Message.write [] - Exception while writing to output stream: Connection reset by peer: socket write error (local port 63796 to address 127.0.0.1, remote port 5051 to address 127.0.0.1)
2024-06-19 11:58:31,116 [ERROR] DPFramework | Message.write [] - Exception while writing to output stream: Socket closed

 

Reference documents
p.23
Data Provisioning Agent Installation and Update Guide
Document Version: 1.0 – 2024-05-09

p.40~p.42
Configuration Guide for Other SAP HANA Scenarios
Document Version: 1.0 – 2024-05-09

Connect and Configure the Data Provisioning Agent
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/9f804b8efa8043539289f42f372c4862/e87952d7c656477cb5558e5c2f44ae9c.html?locale=en-US

Register Adapters with SAP Datasphere
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/9f804b8efa8043539289f42f372c4862/085fc4917f6f4011900344d44d721705.html?locale=en-US


Best regards,
Mike

entry.title: Re: Restrict only J2ee_adm_sid periodic password change i...
entry.content:
Dear Appuru, 

This depends on the security policy of the user.
It is recommended to use "Technical user" for the integration between SOLMAN and the Satellite JAVA system.
If dialog user is used, please review the KB 1953072 for the password validity configuration.
1953072 - Password validity in Java and ABAP system

Br, Peng

entry.title: Re: Law RG2616 Argentina Monotributos - Error in retention
entry.content:
Thank 

In Argentina we have a table that accumulates for 11 months with an amount in the Threshold for withholding for Monotributistas, these 11 months are restarted per period or is it only from the first 11 months of payment that the supplier has, when the 11 months pass and accumulates or exceeds the Threshold is activated with an X in the Table

entry.title: Re: Law RG2616 Argentina Monotributos - Error in retention
entry.content: In Argentina we have a table that accumulates for 11 months with an amount in the Threshold for withholding for Monotributistas, these 11 months are restarted per period or is it only from the first 11 months of payment that the supplier has, when the 11 months pass and accumulates or exceeds the Threshold is activated with an X in the Table

entry.title: Free Temu Coupon Code[act977950] $100 Off For this month all user
entry.content:
Unlock $100 off your Temu order in the US using Coupon Code {act977950} or {frd142523}. This code also offers free gifts and discounts up to 50% for all users. To claim this bonus, simply enter the code during checkout and enjoy a $100 discount on your order.

To expedite communication, we’ve been tracking common questions and complaints to address them collectively. In this post, I’ll cover several recurring topics to let you know that we’ve heard you and to inform you of our plans moving forward.

Sorting Tag Feeds/Notifications by Content Type
Currently, all tag content is grouped under "posts," which includes both blogs and questions. We recognize the need for members to separate blog content from questions at the tag level. We're working on a solution to provide this option and will share more details as they become available.

Feeds by Publication Date (Not Just Recent Activity)
The "Recent Activity" feeds have caused confusion, with members expecting to see the most recently published posts. To clarify, "Recent Activity" includes any recent interactions with older posts. We understand the desire for chronological feeds of new questions and blog posts and are exploring ways to implement this feature. Updates will follow as we make progress.

Page Views on Blog Content
We acknowledge that blog posts should display the number of views and are working to reinstate this feature. More updates will be provided as we have them.

Blog Formatting Post-Migration
Due to the migration, some blog formatting changed, resulting in issues like excess white space and broken links. Editing old posts to restore previous formatting often worsens the issue and violates community best practices. We advise focusing on creating new content that adheres to current blogging standards, using the "Clear formatting" option when copying text from Word.

Subscriptions Not Triggering Notifications
Some members, including myself, have experienced issues with subscription notifications. While we investigate, you might try unsubscribing and resubscribing to your tags or adjusting your notification settings. We are working on resolving this problem and will update you as more information becomes available.

Character Restrictions in Display Names
We’re aware of complaints regarding character restrictions in display names and are exploring options to extend them. If your display name was truncated during migration, you can change it in the "My content" area of the site. For more details on display names and profile usernames, please refer to my post about profiles post-migration.

We anticipate more updates as we continue to refine the platform post-migration. Please subscribe to the "What's New" section to stay informed as my colleagues and I share further updates. Thank you for your patience and cooperation.

entry.title: Re: The RFC does not receive the values passed in when ca...
entry.content:
Hi, it looks like "typo mistake" - wrong parameter names when calling RFC module.

RFC module has parameters V_VBELN etc. but you call it as VBELN.

entry.title: Re: Copy Actuals to Forecast Version Until Start Month in...
entry.content: Nikhil thanks for your answer but the attribute type is text here

entry.title: Re: Filter Section : Fixed Values vs Default values. #BW4...
entry.content:
Filter Fixed Values: Query is always restricted on those values.
Filter Default Values: Query is restricted by 'default values' on execution. You are able to remove/change the restriction while execution and display all/other values.

Best regards,
Thorsten

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
Thanks for the friendly welcome!

I joined the group and also found a group for Bamberg. And Bamberg is actually only an hour away from me by car 🙂

entry.title: Re: Wrong delivery date - Quote Order to Sales Order
entry.content:

sounds like copy control (VOFM routine) is different after update.

Have you checked this as well?

 

Kind regards

Robert

entry.title: Signavio SAP Process Manager license clearing
entry.content: I would like to know how I can establish a process in Signavio Process Manager that automatically removes licenses from an account that has not been used for 90 days. Is there a simple solution for this?

entry.title: Re: The RFC does not receive the values passed in when ca...
entry.content:
Hi,

the types are not the same (vbeln and uname are no strings).

entry.title: Re: Is there any out bound interface between Datasphere t...
entry.content: Yes, there are outbound interfaces between SAP Data sphere (formerly known as SAP Data Warehouse Cloud) and AWS. You can send data from SAP Data sphere to AWS using SAP Data Intelligence, SAP Cloud Integration, or directly via APIs to AWS services like S3, Redshift, or other storage solutions. This integration facilitates data transfer and allows leveraging AWS's extensive cloud services for further processing and analytics.   Best digital marketing agency in vadodara

entry.title: Get Real 40 off Temu Coupon Code[acs970664]or{acs986007} Off For Existin Users
entry.content:
You can get a 40 off Temu coupon code using the code {acs970664}or{acs986007}. This Temu 40 Off code is specifically for new customers and can be redeemed to receive a 40 discount on your purchase. To expedite communication, we've been tracking common questions and complaints to address them collectively
To expedite communication, we’ve been tracking common questions and complaints to address them collectively. In this post, I’ll cover several recurring topics to let you know that we’ve heard you and to inform you of our plans moving forward.

Sorting Tag Feeds/Notifications by Content Type
Currently, all tag content is grouped under "posts," which includes both blogs and questions. We recognize the need for members to separate blog content from questions at the tag level. We're working on a solution to provide this option and will share more details as they become available.

Feeds by Publication Date (Not Just Recent Activity)
The "Recent Activity" feeds have caused confusion, with members expecting to see the most recently published posts. To clarify, "Recent Activity" includes any recent interactions with older posts. We understand the desire for chronological feeds of new questions and blog posts and are exploring ways to implement this feature. Updates will follow as we make progress.

Page Views on Blog Content
We acknowledge that blog posts should display the number of views and are working to reinstate this feature. More updates will be provided as we have them.

Blog Formatting Post-Migration
Due to the migration, some blog formatting changed, resulting in issues like excess white space and broken links. Editing old posts to restore previous formatting often worsens the issue and violates community best practices. We advise focusing on creating new content that adheres to current blogging standards, using the "Clear formatting" option when copying text from Word.

Subscriptions Not Triggering Notifications
Some members, including myself, have experienced issues with subscription notifications. While we investigate, you might try unsubscribing and resubscribing to your tags or adjusting your notification settings. We are working on resolving this problem and will update you as more information becomes available.

Character Restrictions in Display Names
We’re aware of complaints regarding character restrictions in display names and are exploring options to extend them. If your display name was truncated during migration, you can change it in the "My content" area of the site. For more details on display names and profile usernames, please refer to my post about profiles post-migration.

We anticipate more updates as we continue to refine the platform post-migration. Please subscribe to the "What's New" section to stay informed as my colleagues and I share further updates. Thank you for your patience and cooperation.

entry.title: Re: How to select BOM components in sales order based on...
entry.content: In S/4HANA Public Cloud, LO-VC as a configurator (e.g. in sales documents) is not available. AVC must be used. Single transactions like CU01 that are covered by the modeling environment are not available. See also https://blog.sap-press.com/what-is-sap-avc-and-how-does-it-compare-to-lo-vc and https://me.sap.com/notes/3366124/E

entry.title: Temu Coupon Code Australia {acr897367} or {frg227060}
entry.content:
• Unlock significant discounts at Temu UK: Save up to $100 Off + 30% Discount on your favorite items using codes {acr897367} or {frg227060}.

    Blog Formatting Post-Migration
    Due to the migration, some blog formatting changed, resulting in issues like excess white space and broken links. Editing old posts to restore previous formatting often worsens the issue and violates community best practices. We advise focusing on creating new content that adheres to current blogging standards, using the "Clear formatting" option when copying text from Word.

    Subscriptions Not Triggering Notifications
    Some members, including myself, have experienced issues with subscription notifications. While we investigate, you might try unsubscribing and resubscribing to your tags or adjusting your notification settings. We are working on resolving this problem and will update you as more information becomes available.

    Character Restrictions in Display Names
    We’re aware of complaints regarding character restrictions in display names and are exploring options to extend them. If your display name was truncated during migration, you can change it in the "My content" area of the site. For more details on display names and profile usernames, please refer to my post about profiles post-migration.

    We anticipate more updates as we continue to refine the platform post-migration. Please subscribe to the "What's New" section to stay informed as my colleagues and I share further updates. Thank you for your patience and cooperation.

entry.title: Re: Message no. BS051
entry.content: I wanted to create an order with VA01, and I had an offer as an example. I had same problem. I changed it in VA22 as you proposed, and it worked. Thank you

entry.title: Re: Lot-size setup as period lot-size with overlapping ta...
entry.content: pls check if the filed of Individual/coll. = 2， then try to run MRP again.

entry.title: Change in Reference number - After RERAPP
entry.content:
Dear,

After the update run in RERAPP, there is a reference number generated in the FI document which is similar to all the contracts in the REFX module. 

If a business needs to reverse any one document it has to go through the entire document reversal and re-posting it which is not related to reversing.

Hence, we need to generate contract-wise reference number or the FI entry-wise unique reference number possible ?

entry.title: What are the prerequisites for the Sap going live check?
entry.content:
新規に作成したS/4HANAとHANA DBに対してGoing live checkを実施する場合に、solution managerにて実施する必要がある前提作業を教えてください。



------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: What are the prerequisites for the Sap going live check?
entry.content:
ご担当者様

平素よりお世話になっております。

お問い合わせにつき、下記KBAをご参照ください。

2396057 - CQC Service Technical Prerequisites.

以上。よろしくお願いいたします。
SAP サポート

entry.title: Re: Partner profit center xxxx is locked for 2024/06/19
entry.content: pls refer to note https://me.sap.com/notes/3293951/E for your question.

entry.title: How to consume SOAP read API "Manufacturing order - Send V2" in SAP? CO_PPINT_MFGORD_EXE_REQ_OUT_V2
entry.content:
Hello, 

I am working on a SAP S/4 HANA Cloud public edition implementation project (version 2402)

Anyone can help me test and consume this API "Manufacturing order - Send V2" CO_PPINT_MFGORD_EXE_REQ_OUT_V2, from POSTMAN?

https://api.sap.com/api/CO_PPINT_MFGORD_EXE_REQ_OUT_V2/overview

As per my understanding, this is an outbound API that allows to read production order data upon release, but we are not able to execute it yet. 

The request in Postman should be something like: https://host:port/ManufacturingOrderExecuteRequest_Out_V2? or just https://host:port/ as mentioned in API reference website?

In both cases, what should be added in the request body please to be able to retrieve data for one given Production Order? 

We tried first using the OData "Production Order V2" API https://api.sap.com/api/API_PRODUCTION_ORDER_2_SRV/overview, but it was not sufficient for our requirement (for instance, this API does not retrieve the inspection lot information for a production order)

entry.title: Re: how to make line of business mandatory in incoming pa...
entry.content:
Hi,

If this is been set up as a cost center then in the chart of accounts you can select the check box "relevant to cost center" if the GL affected in the journal entry is of sales / expenditure type.

Else, go for a TN.

Regards

entry.title: Temu Coupon Code $40 off [ACR620545]&[ACQ620545] For New Users
entry.content:
Our incredible Temu coupon code [ACR620545]&[ACQ620545] for 40% off is here to help you save big on your purchases. Whether you're a new user or an existing user.Both the code are available on Temu Website.

to expedite communication, we’ve been tracking common questions and complaints to address them collectively. In this post, I’ll cover several recurring topics to let you know that we’ve heard you and to inform you of our plans moving forward.

Sorting Tag Feeds/Notifications by Content Type

Currently, all tag content is grouped under "posts," which includes both blogs and questions. We recognize the need for members to separate blog content from questions at the tag level. We're working on a solution to provide this option and will share more details as they become available.

Feeds by Publication Date (Not Just Recent Activity)
The "Recent Activity" feeds have caused confusion, with members expecting to see the most recently published posts. To clarify, "Recent Activity" includes any recent interactions with older posts. We understand the desire for chronological feeds of new questions and blog posts and are exploring ways to implement this feature. Updates will follow as we make progress.

Page Views on Blog Content
We acknowledge that blog posts should display the number of views and are working to reinstate this feature. More updates will be provided as we have them.

Blog Formatting Post-Migration
Due to the migration, some blog formatting changed, resulting in issues like excess white space and broken links. Editing old posts to restore previous formatting often worsens the issue and violates community best practices. We advise focusing on creating new content that adheres to current blogging standards, using the "Clear formatting" option when copying text from Word.

Subscriptions Not Triggering Notifications
Some members, including myself, have experienced issues with subscription notifications. While we investigate, you might try unsubscribing and resubscribing to your tags or adjusting your notification settings. We are working on resolving this problem and will update you as more information becomes available.

Character Restrictions in Display Names
We’re aware of complaints regarding character restrictions in display names and are exploring options to extend them. If your display name was truncated during migration, you can change it in the "My content" area of the site. For more details on display names and profile usernames, please refer to my post about profiles post-migration.

We anticipate more updates as we continue to refine the platform post-migration. Please subscribe to the "What's New" section to stay informed as my colleagues and I share further updates. Thank you for your patience and cooperation.

entry.title: Re: Problem with Transport SAC Story / + Dataset
entry.content:
Hi all,

I get the same error with exactly the same error message. Is there already a solution available?

Regards,

Stefan

entry.title: Re: Cloud BAdI replacement for BADI_SLS_HEAD_SCR_CUS?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Can we add buttons in the additional tab created by custom fields and logic app. If that's not possible, Is there any alternative for this?

Thanks in advance,

Vidya.

entry.title: Re: Pushing Value with wrong format in Excel
entry.content:
I have fixed the issue with " ' " + variable 

BR
Paul

entry.title: Unlock $100 off Temu Coupon Code {act200019} Up to 90 OFF on all order
entry.content:
Unlock $100 off your Temu order in the US using Coupon Code "act200019". This code also offers free gifts and discounts of up to 90% off for all users. To claim this bonus, simply enter the code during checkout and enjoy a $100 discount on your order.

To expedite communication, we’ve been tracking common questions and complaints to address them collectively. In this post, I’ll cover several recurring topics to let you know that we’ve heard you and to inform you of our plans moving forward.

Sorting Tag Feeds/Notifications by Content Type
Currently, all tag content is grouped under "posts," which includes both blogs and questions. We recognize the need for members to separate blog content from questions at the tag level. We're working on a solution to provide this option and will share more details as they become available.

Feeds by Publication Date (Not Just Recent Activity)
The "Recent Activity" feeds have caused confusion, with members expecting to see the most recently published posts. To clarify, "Recent Activity" includes any recent interactions with older posts. We understand the desire for chronological feeds of new questions and blog posts and are exploring ways to implement this feature. Updates will follow as we make progress.

Page Views on Blog Content
We acknowledge that blog posts should display the number of views and are working to reinstate this feature. More updates will be provided as we have them.

Blog Formatting Post-Migration
Due to the migration, some blog formatting changed, resulting in issues like excess white space and broken links. Editing old posts to restore previous formatting often worsens the issue and violates community best practices. We advise focusing on creating new content that adheres to current blogging standards, using the "Clear formatting" option when copying text from Word.

Subscriptions Not Triggering Notifications
Some members, including myself, have experienced issues with subscription notifications. While we investigate, you might try unsubscribing and resubscribing to your tags or adjusting your notification settings. We are working on resolving this problem and will update you as more information becomes available.

Character Restrictions in Display Names
We’re aware of complaints regarding character restrictions in display names and are exploring options to extend them. If your display name was truncated during migration, you can change it in the "My content" area of the site. For more details on display names and profile usernames, please refer to my post about profiles post-migration.

We anticipate more updates as we continue to refine the platform post-migration. Please subscribe to the "What's New" section to stay informed as my colleagues and I share further updates. Thank you for your patience and cooperation.

entry.title: Re: Restrict only J2ee_adm_sid periodic password change i...
entry.content:
It depends on your ume configuration.
If the user is located in the local java database, set the user to type "Technical".
If the ume ist pointing to the ABAP stack and the user is located there, change it in SU01 to type "Service"

entry.title: Re: SAP EMS- Challenges in Using Batch jobs to update EMS...
entry.content:
Hi Srinivas, 

You could leverage Update Task of ruleset to update status of entiltement together with end date. 

In basic mode, advanced mode and script task all support. 

Just to find the ruleset update end date of entiltement first and update this ruleset update task. 

Br,

Lambert Chen

entry.title: Re: Object Page in Fiori List Report is blank (Column hea...
entry.content:
Hi,
I have defined the annotations in my cds view. Am I supposed to add something else?

entry.title: Re: Adding fields to AMON1 (Alert Monitor)
entry.content:
HI Wesh,

There are some help in SE18 in the documentation of: BAdI /SAPAPO/AM_ALERTLIST - MODIFY_FIELDCATALOG.

See also: 1374207 - AMON: Modifying the field catalog of saved alert situations - example class: /SAPAPO/CL_EXM_IM_AM_ALERTLIST

See also: Enhancing Alerts in Alert Monitor

Br,

Geri

entry.title: Re: Incoming payment from a multi-currencues BP
entry.content:
Hi,

if customer is not making payment in full against these invoices you can mention the amount to be allocated in the invoice row selected. SAP has given a provision to enter partial amount.

Else, in the payment means window, using shortcut key Ctrl + B will give you the total receivable automatically.

In the payment means window itself, there is a field to enter the exchange rate prevailing at the time of receiving payment. 

System will calculate the exchange rate difference as gain / loss appropriately.

And the invoices will be affected in term of balance due as per the amount received. The total amount paid or due in respect of invoice currency will not change. The impact will be visible in ageing report. 

By default the outstanding will be shown at the exchange rate mentioned in the document. By using the option Translate Leading Currency at Aging Date you can check.

Hope this helps

Regards

entry.title: Re: The RFC does not receive the values passed in when ca...
entry.content:
Hi,

There is typo mistake. Use V_VBELN instead of VBELN and V_USNAM instead of USNAM while calling the RFC in your program.

 

Regards,

Vikash Ranjan

entry.title: Re: is the Entitlement Management system customizable?
entry.content:
Both Entitlement Model and entitlement master data support user to add customized attribute. Please refer to below help to do the configuration, so that EMS could capture your customized info.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ENTITLEMENT_MANAGEMENT/c8403d8ad9334b2094b81ed605020727/14758f35a0014771be93f90d860bf578.html?locale=en-US

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ENTITLEMENT_MANAGEMENT/c8403d8ad9334b2094b81ed605020727/261807206c7d41939e5403d797991e32.html?locale=en-US

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ENTITLEMENT_MANAGEMENT/c8403d8ad9334b2094b81ed605020727/4999032cd2df4dd499a540bf47907aab.html?locale=en-US

Br,

Lambert Chen

entry.title: Re: Can we Activate Budget Availability Control for ACDOC...
entry.content:
Hi Abhinav,

1) Can we Activate Budget Availability Control for ACDOCP Table for Projects in S/4 HANA 2023 private Cloud?

2) If yes, can we achive functionalities of Buget Transfer/Budget release/Budget supplimentals also from ACDOCP table?

4) Can we completely get rid of Old tables and move to combination of ACDOCP Table & ACDOCA tables going forward ?

Or can anyone please explain how is sap planning the Budget Availability Control for ACDOCP Table via ACDOCP Table?

No, Availability Control based on ACDOCP is not yet supported for projects in OP/private cloud. It is planned to include this feature as part of the roadmap, but at the moment there is not yet a timeline or defined scope.

When using transfer from PPM you can however use the transfer into the "old" tables (BPGE, BPJA) in addition to the ACDOCP transfer, with that you could use AVC and have the values in ACDOCP.

 

3) If SAC is used for budget planning, are the values stored in ACDOCP Table and can we use the availability control from SAC in that case ?

The Portfolio financial planning content https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/42093f14b43c485fbe3adbbe81eff6c8/fef35a05181f4b5f879734708fc87433.html is leveraging the ACDOCP API, so same as described above. If you need AVC, you could consider using additionally export to the classic tables.

entry.title: Re: SAP Public Cloud Access using IAS as Proxy but no use...
entry.content:
Hi all!

The customer does not want users to be created in the Cloud Identity Store > is no longer a valid objection.

Honestly, I can’t hear it anymore. It is the responsibility of SAP consultants to convey to companies that user persistence in the IdDS is necessary to ensure future readiness. Please just keep that in mind. #nodiscussionsaboutpersistingusersintheIdDS 😅

To underline this here is a quote from the current framework CIO Guide: Identity Lifecycle in SAP Landscapes Focusing on Identity and Access Management Services | Source

"To utilize new applications and features in SAP BTP, it is essential that the Identity Directory in SAP Cloud Identity Services includes all relevant users. Currently, almost all SAP applications and each SAP BTP subaccount maintain their own user stores. This legacy setup complicates remote management and compliance. The rapid development of cloud technologies has introduced various software stacks and methods of interacting with these user stores. SAP’s strategy aims to simplify this complexity through SAP Cloud Identity Services in the long term. The objective is to centralize user and group management within SAP Cloud Identity Services, enabling remote management of the entire SAP cloud landscape using APIs. New applications and SAP BTP features necessitate that users are present in the Identity Directory. To utilize these features, the Identity Directory must be populated with all relevant users, facilitating functions such as assigning policies through the Authorization Management service. While the initial setup of SAP Cloud Identity Services for the first application might require additional effort, it significantly reduces the workload for subsequent applications, as there will be no need to populate additional application-specific user stores."

In recent years, SAP has been executing a strategy to centralize IAM through SAP Cloud Identity Services. Many SAP solutions are already integrated and bundled through this service, and we plan to continue this integration journey.

Integration and extension capabilities will continue to improve in future releases of services for managing identities in intelligent enterprises. Your toolset for handling complex landscapes and third-party integrations will expand, providing a smoother user experience. In summary, a key strategy at SAP is to enhance existing solutions to offer consistent security and identity management capabilities for intelligent enterprises, ultimately aiming for seamless integration across your entire enterprise. Future improvements in identity and access management will enable security and integration by default, with preconfiguration and automation to manage authentication, authorization, and governance efficiently.

entry.title: Re: Processing 944 IDOCs with multiple error lines
entry.content: What kind of IDoc / ALE message is that?

entry.title: Re: How to register Bank Account ID
entry.content: Miiwa, the Bank Account ID in your screenshot is the one I mean. The API doesn't suppor this field, so it shows incorrect ID number as in your screen.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to call a fix URL from IW52 trasnactio...
entry.content: Is ther eno one who can help on this topic and provide some real solution? I just need to call a URL from standard transaction IW52 by implementing there a custom button.

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 2 - Words as Ve
entry.content:
Hi @Vitaliy-R , Yes i was using different combination. Now i have replaced with below one and result is,

word1='king'
related_word1='man'
word2='queen'

entry.title: Free $100 Off Temu Coupon Code [act200019] For this month all user
entry.content:
Unlock $100 off your Temu order in the US using Coupon Code {act200019}. This code also offers free gifts and discounts of up to 50% for all users. To claim this bonus, simply enter the code during checkout and enjoy a $100 discount on your order.

To expedite communication, we’ve been tracking common questions and complaints to address them collectively. In this post, I’ll cover several recurring topics to let you know that we’ve heard you and to inform you of our plans moving forward.

Sorting Tag Feeds/Notifications by Content Type
Currently, all tag content is grouped under "posts," which includes both blogs and questions. We recognize the need for members to separate blog content from questions at the tag level. We're working on a solution to provide this option and will share more details as they become available.

Feeds by Publication Date (Not Just Recent Activity)
The "Recent Activity" feeds have caused confusion, with members expecting to see the most recently published posts. To clarify, "Recent Activity" includes any recent interactions with older posts. We understand the desire for chronological feeds of new questions and blog posts and are exploring ways to implement this feature. Updates will follow as we make progress.

Page Views on Blog Content
We acknowledge that blog posts should display the number of views and are working to reinstate this feature. More updates will be provided as we have them.

Blog Formatting Post-Migration
Due to the migration, some blog formatting changed, resulting in issues like excess white space and broken links. Editing old posts to restore previous formatting often worsens the issue and violates community best practices. We advise focusing on creating new content that adheres to current blogging standards, using the "Clear formatting" option when copying text from Word.

Subscriptions Not Triggering Notifications
Some members, including myself, have experienced issues with subscription notifications. While we investigate, you might try unsubscribing and resubscribing to your tags or adjusting your notification settings. We are working on resolving this problem and will update you as more information becomes available.

Character Restrictions in Display Names
We’re aware of complaints regarding character restrictions in display names and are exploring options to extend them. If your display name was truncated during migration, you can change it in the "My content" area of the site. For more details on display names and profile usernames, please refer to my post about profiles post-migration.

We anticipate more updates as we continue to refine the platform post-migration. Please subscribe to the "What's New" section to stay informed as my colleagues and I share further updates. Thank you for your patience and cooperation.

entry.title: Re: The RFC does not receive the values passed in when ca...
entry.content: and being optional... it goes unnoticed at compile time

entry.title: Re: How to set Flat Hierarchy with a switch when 'Show on...
entry.content:
Hi Nikhil,

I already tried that and does not work. But thanks for your comment!

entry.title: Re: Pricing problem in Commerce Cloud with CPS
entry.content:
Hi Benedikt,
I suppose this is about the Spartacus frontend, correct?
Where exactly are you missing the prices?
If I read this correctly, the prices are available on the configuration overview page, where the configuration summary is displayed.
Is the price summary present on the configuration page (where you enter the attribute values)? Or are you missing the delta prices displayed along with the attribute values?

Best regards,
Christoph

entry.title: Re: Calling a BAPI inside a BADI
entry.content: You are absolutely right - the question doesn't make sense.

entry.title: Change inbound delivery date once delivery is distributed to EWM
entry.content:
Hi,

We have a requirement to change the inbound delivery date once delivery is distributed to EWM.

I need to do enhancement in EWM side to update the delivery date. Is there any badi I can use? or any suggestions?

Note: We change the date before starting any activity, goods receipt will be done once we change the date.

entry.title: How can we fetch Logged In Email from SAP BTP iOS Application
entry.content: How can we fetch Logged In Email/Details from SAP BTP iOS Application without using URLs but using SDK methods since we do not have public domain, rather a private network.

entry.title: Re: Lot-size setup as period lot-size with overlapping ta...
entry.content: Hi, we have Collective requirements only set. If that is correct than it is not helping still we get wrong results as in description.

entry.title: Re: Repost & Split Open Items in Receivable/Payables
entry.content: Hi Clément, I am in a similar situation, do you have any tips or advices now?

entry.title: Re: Calling a BAPI inside a BADI
entry.content:
I had googled and came to know that we are not supposed to call BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT in the BADI when we call a BAPI within the BADI.Commit Work related to the BADI will take care of the COMMIT and there is no need to call the BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT specifically which may result in dump sometimes.

Are there any advantages/disadvantages/pitfalls that you experts are aware of. Thanks.

K.Kiran.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA for international trade vs SAP Global Trade Services
entry.content:
Hi Derrick,

Hope this might help you and not sure whether I am right or wrong. 🙂

IMG - Financial Accounting - Tax on Sales/Purchases - Basic Settings -

Under each Region/country - example India - Goods & Services Tax - General Settings - Maintain HSN & SAV.   Table details: V_T604F

Ref. Screenshots:

HSN code (Control Code) @ IMGControl Code in Material Master - Int. Trade Import , Export

 

Table view for the control code shown in material master

Regards,

Ramana Rao.

entry.title: Interested in SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hello David.

This is Carmo. I am interested in this digital skills initiative. I would like to learn, understand and certify myself in SAP SuccessFactors. As a Beginner,  I request your guidance in the path I should follow to achieve my objectives. Thank you for providing eager learners with this self-study platform.

Best Regards,

entry.title: Re: One Delivery and 2 Separate Sales Invoices - SAP Busi...
entry.content:
Hi,

Standard SAP will not allow this. Relationship between Delivery and invoice will no longer exist the moment you change the business partner.

This can be addressed as follows: - 

1. create a stand alone invoice in the name of second customer and attach the delivery document in the referenced document under accounting tab and then the data can be pulled with the help of custom report and open quantities to be controlled through TN.

There is no other way to handle this.

Regards

entry.title: Re: How to attach documents to a Journal Entry within SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud from ABAP.
entry.content: Thank you, with the communication agreement, we resolve it

entry.title: Re: Gr processing time in Purchase order
entry.content:
Hi @AAkash1 

No, that's not possible - if it were, it would make scheduling go back in time. That's not possible unless in

You said you use GR processing time "to fake a Md04 report" - that doesn't sound right to fake anything in SAP. 

If you describe your process and requirements in more detailed, maybe a more standard solution could be found.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: PO save with "Duplicate owners: Contact LO-VC development" ABAP dump
entry.content:
When changing Tradename on a PO from Material data tab, I got an ABAP run time error when try to save the PO.

Short text of the error message
Duplicate owners: Contact LO-V
Long text of the error message
Technical information about th
Message class....... CUIB1
Number.............. 699
Variable 1..........
Variable 2..........
Variable 3..........
Variable 4.......... " "

Strange thing is it only happens to one specific PO, while everything works fine to all other POs (with exactly the same information, like supplier, material code, plant code, etc.)

There was no issue at all when changing tradename to other POs and save, but dump occurs every time when trying to save this particular PO, they were all processed by the same user.

Referred to note 610828, 537250 and 510129, it seems they are not applicable to what I am facing with the PO.

Anyone has any ideas?

Thanks in advance.

Br,

Tori Ji

entry.title: Re: How to access XSUAA enabled CAP Service destination in standalone SAP UI5 Application
entry.content: not working for me, can you pls upload your destination along with xs-app routes

    Blog Formatting Post-Migration
    Due to the migration, some blog formatting changed, resulting in issues like excess white space and broken links. Editing old posts to restore previous formatting often worsens the issue and violates community best practices. We advise focusing on creating new content that adheres to current blogging standards, using the "Clear formatting" option when copying text from Word.

    Subscriptions Not Triggering Notifications
    Some members, including myself, have experienced issues with subscription notifications. While we investigate, you might try unsubscribing and resubscribing to your tags or adjusting your notification settings. We are working on resolving this problem and will update you as more information becomes available.

    Character Restrictions in Display Names
    We’re aware of complaints regarding character restrictions in display names and are exploring options to extend them. If your display name was truncated during migration, you can change it in the "My content" area of the site. For more details on display names and profile usernames, please refer to my post about profiles post-migration.

    We anticipate more updates as we continue to refine the platform post-migration. Please subscribe to the "What's New" section to stay informed as my colleagues and I share further updates. Thank you for your patience and cooperation.
